response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches JSON reference. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for lyric synchronization, aligning each line with precision. 3. Timing & Pacing: Strictly followed vocal cues to handle transitions and tempo changes, and added visual subtitle for the song title introduction screen.

subtitles.original: お気に召すまま / Lyrics & Music: Eve
subtitles.english: [Title: Okinimesumama / Lyrics & Music: Eve]

subtitles.original: 淡々 言葉を吐いた
subtitles.english: Indifferently, I spat out the words

subtitles.original: あんな思い出に泣いたのは
subtitles.english: Crying over such memories

subtitles.original: 今日で終わりにしないか
subtitles.english: Why don't we end it today?

subtitles.original: 1, 2の合図を待って
subtitles.english: Waiting for the 1, 2 signal

subtitles.original: ユーエンミー手を取りあったのは
subtitles.english: You and me, holding hands

subtitles.original: 僕の勇気ある行動 フェイズ
subtitles.english: It was my brave action, phase

subtitles.original: 立ち止まんないでいいんだからね
subtitles.english: You don't have to stop

subtitles.original: 空々しいな この人生
subtitles.english: It's so hollow, this life

subtitles.original: できないだなんて 言わないでね
subtitles.english: Don't say you can't, don't say it

subtitles.original: 言わないでね
subtitles.english: Don't say it...

subtitles.original: 今更なんて 言わないでね
subtitles.english: Don't say it's too late now

subtitles.original: 今更なんて 言わないでね
subtitles.english: Don't say it's too late now

subtitles.original: 僕ら今さあさあ輪になって 回り始める
subtitles.english: Now, come on, come on, we form a circle and start spinning

subtitles.original: 段々嫌になって でも好きになる
subtitles.english: Gradually I come to hate it, but then I love it

subtitles.original: ねえねえ わかんないや 自分会議も
subtitles.english: Hey, hey, I don't know, even my self-meetings

subtitles.original: どんどん 中に寄って でも離れてく
subtitles.english: More and more, we get close, but then drift apart

subtitles.original: ぱっぱっ 音に乗って 踊り始める
subtitles.english: Pa-pa, riding on the sound, we start to dance

subtitles.original: 散々嫌になって でも好きになる
subtitles.english: I come to hate it so much, but then I love it

subtitles.original: ねえねえ わかんないや この先もずっと
subtitles.english: Hey, hey, I don't know, from here on out forever

subtitles.original: 僕の心をシェイクシェイク いえい
subtitles.english: Shake shake my heart, yeah

subtitles.original: 大正解なんてないのさ
subtitles.english: There's no big correct answer

subtitles.original: じゃあ一体どこに向かえば
subtitles.english: So where on earth should I head to?

subtitles.original: 物語は終わりますか
